functional_requirements.description: Customer can browse restaurants and menus
Customer can place an order with multiple items
Customer can track delivery in real time on a map
Restaurant can manage menu items and prices
Restaurant can accept or reject incoming orders
Driver can accept and complete deliveries
Admin can manage users and restaurants
Customer can rate and review restaurants and drivers
System sends notifications for order status changes

non_functional_requirements.target: response time under 200ms for API calls
all payments must be encrypted end-to-end
zero data loss for order transactions
